subcodes.first_line: The Promise hath come, and the Promised One declareth: O thou who art mentioned before the Throne and who standest before the Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اتی الوعد و الموعود یقول یا ایها المذکور لدی العرش و القائم امام الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat], @courtesy; culture [adab], @justice and mercy, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
